timing_boundary: The inspected commit is approximately one day after arXiv v1 and is linked release evidence, not proof of the exact paper-time implementation.

inspection.method: Full official repository clone checked out at the pinned commit; complete tracked tree and selected runtime, task, rubric, privacy, test, documentation, and result-publication paths inspected.

limitations: No paper result tree, raw trajectories, per-task scores, human reliability labels, or bilingual-equivalence adjudications are tracked at the pinned commit.
Large Git/LFS-backed task assets were inspected through the checked-out official clone and immutable tree manifest; no duplicate repository archive is retained locally.
